title: City of Oakland Street Vendor Seizures First Quarter 2026

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All documents pertaining to the seizure of property of street vendors, unlicensed street vendors or food sellers, or any similiar individuals and businesses  in City of Oakland between May 1, 2026 and June 9 2026. 

All documents pertaining to policies of the police department, public works, and public health pertaining to enforcement of laws on unlicensed or illegal street street vendors.

All emails or text messages, sent, received, drafted, or deleted Chief of Police and Director of Public Works, between January 1, 2026 and June 9, 2026 that pertain to unlicensed street vendors or use the following key words: "street" "vendor" "street vendor" "mobile" "sidewalk" "mobile vendor" "sidewalk vendor" "food vendor" "unpermitted"

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Robbie Powelson

title: All records on Austin Tucker Martin and the Feb 22, 2026 Mar-a-Lago shooting

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I request all records concerning Austin Tucker Martin (Moore County, NC) and the February 22, 2026 Mar-a-Lago perimeter breach and fatal shooting, including: investigative reports, background checks, interviews, digital forensics, communications with Secret Service/Palm Beach County SO, bodycam/surveillance video, use-of-force reports, and any other related documents.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Citizen Commission
